---
title: "ggRibo Coverage Plots — `r params$project$label`"
author: "Ribo-seq Pipeline"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
    embed-resources: true
params:
  config: "config_template.yaml"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(data.table)
  library(tibble)
})
library(ggRibo)
library(yaml)
library(R6)
library(scales)

if (file.exists("_functions.R")) {
  source("_functions.R")
} else if (file.exists("../../scripts/post_analysis/_functions.R")) {
  source("../../scripts/post_analysis/_functions.R")
} else {
  stop("Cannot find _functions.R")
}

cfg <- load_config(params$config)
ggc <- cfg$ggribo

# Apply defaults
if (is.null(ggc$top_n_samples)) ggc$top_n_samples <- 10
if (is.null(ggc$sort_metric)) ggc$sort_metric <- "p_site_GSE"

# Helper: read TSV via data.table
.read_tsv_gg <- function(path) {
  as_tibble(data.table::fread(path, sep = "\t", header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE))
}

# Load final ORF list (from 02_psite_filtering)
orf_list_file <- file.path(cfg$input$output_dir, "final_orfs_for_ggribo.tsv")
if (!file.exists(orf_list_file)) {
  stop("final_orfs_for_ggribo.tsv not found — run 02_psite_filtering.qmd first")
}
orfs <- .read_tsv_gg(orf_list_file)
message(sprintf("Loaded %d ORFs for ggRibo plotting", nrow(orfs)))

# Load expression for sample lookups
expr <- .read_tsv_gg(cfg$input$expression)

# Load metadata for exon_blocks and ORF details (needed for proper GTF generation)
meta <- .read_tsv_gg(cfg$input$metadata)
message(sprintf("Loaded metadata for %d ORFs", nrow(meta)))

# Load P-site purity if available (for sorting and title metrics)
psite_file <- file.path(cfg$input$output_dir, "psite_purity.tsv")
psite_data <- NULL
if (file.exists(psite_file)) {
  psite_data <- .read_tsv_gg(psite_file)
  message(sprintf("Loaded P-site purity data for %d ORFs", nrow(psite_data)))
} else {
  message("P-site purity data not found — sorting by reads only")
}

# Setup output directories
plot_base <- file.path(cfg$input$output_dir, "ggribo_plots")
tmp_gtf_dir <- file.path(cfg$input$output_dir, "tmp_gtf")
dir.create(plot_base, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
dir.create(tmp_gtf_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
```

# 1. ORF Summary

```{r orf-summary, echo=FALSE}
orfs |>
  dplyr::count(orf_biotype, sort = TRUE) |>
  mutate(pct = 100 * n / sum(n)) |>
  knitr::kable(format = "html", digits = 1,
    col.names = c("Biotype", "Count", "%"),
    caption = "ORFs to plot by biotype")
```

**Plot parameters:**
- Top N samples: `r ggc$top_n_samples`
- Sort metric: `r ggc$sort_metric`
- Flanking extension: `r ggc$extend_bp` bp
- Workers: `r ggc$workers`

# 2. Generate ggRibo Plots

```{r ggribo-generate, results='asis'}
org_label   <- cfg$project$label
org_species <- cfg$project$species
org_id      <- cfg$project$name

# ── Single-ORF plotter (used by mclapply) ──
plot_one <- function(i, orfs, meta, expr, psite_data, cfg, tmp_gtf_dir, plot_base,
                     org_id, org_label, org_species) {
  r <- orfs[i, ]
  biotype_dir <- file.path(plot_base, r$orf_biotype)
  dir.create(biotype_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

  # Safe filename
  orf_id_clean <- gsub("[:/ ]", "_", r$orf_id)
  out_file <- file.path(biotype_dir, paste0(orf_id_clean, ".png"))

  if (file.exists(out_file)) {
    return(tibble(orf_id = r$orf_id, status = "cached", file = out_file))
  }

  # GTF: build from full ORF metadata (incl. exon_blocks, strand, etc.)
  m <- meta[meta$orf_id == r$orf_id, ]
  if (nrow(m) == 0) {
    return(tibble(orf_id = r$orf_id, status = "no_metadata", file = NA_character_))
  }
  orf_meta <- as.list(m[1, ])
  orf_meta$org <- org_id
  gtf_path <- file.path(tmp_gtf_dir, paste0("ggribo_", i, ".gtf"))
  ids <- tryCatch(create_orf_gtf(orf_meta, gtf_path),
                  error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(ids)) return(tibble(orf_id = r$orf_id, status = "gtf_error", file = NA_character_))

  # Top samples sorted by configured metric
  sort_by <- cfg$ggribo$sort_metric
  if (is.null(sort_by)) sort_by <- "reads"
  top <- find_top_samples(expr, r$orf_id, n = cfg$ggribo$top_n_samples,
                          psite_data = psite_data, sort_by = sort_by)
  if (is.null(top) || length(top) == 0)
    return(tibble(orf_id = r$orf_id, status = "no_samples", file = NA_character_))

  bg_list <- list(); sn_list <- c()
  for (s in top) {
    bg <- find_bedgraph_files(cfg, s$sample)
    if (!is.null(bg)) {
      bg_list[[length(bg_list) + 1]] <- bg
      sn_list <- c(sn_list, s$sample)
    }
  }
  if (length(bg_list) == 0)
    return(tibble(orf_id = r$orf_id, status = "no_bedgraph", file = NA_character_))
  ns <- length(bg_list)

  # Plot
  tryCatch({
    gtf_import_custom(gtf_path, format = "gtf", organism = org_species)
    seq_result <- create_seq_input(
      ribo_files = bg_list, sample_names = sn_list, include_rna = FALSE
    )
    assign("inputs_full", seq_result, envir = .GlobalEnv)

    orf_len <- r$end - r$start

    # Build title with available metrics
    title_parts <- c(
      org_label,
      r$orf_id,
      r$orf_biotype,
      sprintf("%dnt", orf_len)
    )
    if (!is.null(r$total_reads_expr)) {
      title_parts <- c(title_parts, sprintf("reads=%s", format(r$total_reads_expr, big.mark = ",")))
    }
    if (!is.null(r$max_pN)) {
      title_parts <- c(title_parts, sprintf("pN=%.1f", r$max_pN))
    }
    if (!is.null(r$total_psites_real) && r$total_psites_real > 0) {
      title_parts <- c(title_parts, sprintf("GSE=%s", format(round(r$total_psites_real), big.mark = ",")))
    }
    if (!is.null(r$mean_p_site_pct) && !is.na(r$mean_p_site_pct)) {
      title_parts <- c(title_parts, sprintf("pct=%.2f", r$mean_p_site_pct))
    }
    title_str <- paste(title_parts, collapse = " | ")

    p <- ggRibo(
      gene_id    = ids$gene_id,
      tx_id      = ids$tx_id,
      Extend     = cfg$ggribo$extend_bp,
      NAME       = title_str,
      Riboseq    = seq_result$Riboseq,
      SampleNames = sn_list,
      GRangeInfo  = Txome_Range,
      data_types  = rep("Ribo-seq", ns),
      Y_scale     = "each",
      plot_genomic_direction = TRUE,
      show_seq    = FALSE,
      ribo_linewidth = 0.6
    )

    # Height scales with number of sample panels
    ggsave(out_file, p, width = 14, height = max(6, ns * 2.5),
           dpi = 150, limitsize = FALSE, bg = "white")

    tibble(orf_id = r$orf_id, status = "ok", file = out_file)
  }, error = function(e) {
    tibble(orf_id = r$orf_id, status = paste0("error: ", e$message),
           file = NA_character_)
  })
}

# ── Batch execution ──
message(sprintf("Generating %d ggRibo plots with %d workers (top %d samples by %s) ...",
        nrow(orfs), ggc$workers, ggc$top_n_samples, ggc$sort_metric))

# Use parallel::mclapply (base R, no furrr dependency)
results_list <- parallel::mclapply(seq_len(nrow(orfs)), plot_one,
  orfs = orfs, meta = meta, expr = expr, psite_data = psite_data, cfg = cfg,
  tmp_gtf_dir = tmp_gtf_dir, plot_base = plot_base,
  org_id = org_id, org_label = org_label, org_species = org_species,
  mc.cores = ggc$workers
)

results <- dplyr::bind_rows(results_list)

# Summarise
res_summary <- results |>
  dplyr::count(status) |>
  mutate(pct = 100 * n / sum(n))

res_summary |>
  knitr::kable(format = "html", digits = 1,
    col.names = c("Status", "Count", "%"),
    caption = "ggRibo generation results")
```

# 3. Plot Index

```{r index, results='asis'}
# Build HTML index grouped by biotype
biotypes <- unique(orfs$orf_biotype) |> sort()

cat("## Generated Plots\n\n")

for (bt in biotypes) {
  bt_dir <- file.path(plot_base, bt)
  pngs <- list.files(bt_dir, pattern = "\\.png$", full.names = FALSE)
  if (length(pngs) == 0) next

  cat(sprintf("### %s (%d plots)\n\n", bt, length(pngs)))
  cat('<div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;">\n')

  for (png in pngs[1:min(20, length(pngs))]) {
    rel_path <- file.path(bt, png)
    cat(sprintf(
      '<div style="width:300px"><a href="%s" target="_blank"><img src="%s" style="width:100%%" loading="lazy"></a><p style="font-size:10px">%s</p></div>\n',
      rel_path, rel_path, png
    ))
  }

  if (length(pngs) > 20) {
    cat(sprintf('\n<p><em>... and %d more plots</em></p>\n', length(pngs) - 20))
  }

  cat('</div>\n\n')
}
```

```{r final-summary, echo=FALSE}
cat(sprintf(
  "\n### Complete\n\n- **Total ORFs:** %d\n- **Plotted:** %d\n- **Errors:** %d\n- **Sort metric:** %s\n- **Top N samples:** %d\n- **Output:** %s\n\n",
  nrow(orfs),
  sum(results$status == "ok"),
  sum(results$status != "ok"),
  ggc$sort_metric,
  ggc$top_n_samples,
  plot_base
))
```
